stages.concept:
# Unit 076: 동명사와 현재분사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동명사와 현재분사**의 차이에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **Swimming** is fun. (동명사 — 명사 역할)
> 수영하는 것은 재미있다.

> The **swimming** boy is my brother. (현재분사 — 형용사 역할)
> 수영하고 있는 소년은 나의 남동생이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 동명사와 현재분사는 둘 다 **-ing** 형태이지만, 역할이 달라요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **동명사** — 명사 역할 (주어, 목적어, 보어)

> **Cooking** is her hobby. (주어)
> 요리하는 것은 그녀의 취미이다.

> I enjoy **painting**. (목적어)
> 나는 그림 그리기를 즐긴다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **현재분사** — 형용사 역할 (명사 수식, 보어), 진행형

> The **sleeping** baby is cute. (명사 수식)
> 자고 있는 아기가 귀엽다.

> She is **singing** a song. (진행형)
> 그녀는 노래를 부르고 있다.

**Q. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 나머지와 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르세요.**
1. His hobby is <u>collecting</u> stamps. (~하는 것 - 동명사)
2. Look at the <u>sleeping</u> dog. ✅ (~하고 있는 - 현재분사)
3. <u>Reading</u> a book is fun. (~하는 것 - 동명사)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 구별하는 방법: **~하는 것**으로 해석되면 동명사, **~하고 있는**으로 해석되면 현재분사!

> a **sleeping** bag → 잠 자는 가방? → 잠 자기 위한 가방 → **동명사**
> a **sleeping** baby → 자고 있는 아기 → **현재분사**

🧑‍🎓 학생: 둘 다 -ing지만, '~하는 것'이면 동명사, '~하고 있는'이면 현재분사! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 076: 동명사와 현재분사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 동명사인지 현재분사인지 고르시오.
One of his goals is visiting famous places.
> **정답** 동명사

---

**02.** The girl singing on the stage is my sister.
> **정답** 현재분사

---

**03.** I enjoy playing basketball.
> **정답** 동명사

---

**04.** The running boy is my friend.
> **정답** 현재분사

---

**05.** His hobby is drawing pictures.
> **정답** 동명사

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 밑줄 친 부분의 역할을 고르시오.
Reading books is my favorite hobby.
> **정답** 동명사 (주어)

---

**07.** The sleeping baby looks cute.
> **정답** 현재분사 (명사 수식)

---

**08.** She is good at cooking.
> **정답** 동명사 (전치사의 목적어)

---

**09.** Look at the flying bird.
> **정답** 현재분사 (명사 수식)

---

**10.** My plan is traveling around Korea.
> **정답** 동명사 (보어)

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
수영하는 것은 좋은 운동이다.
is good exercise.
> **정답** Swimming

---

**12.** 달리고 있는 소년은 내 동생이다.
The boy is my brother.
> **정답** running

---

**13.** 나의 취미는 노래 부르기이다.
My hobby is .
> **정답** singing

---

**14.** 웃고 있는 소녀를 봐라.
Look at the girl.
> **정답** smiling (laughing)

---

**15.** 그녀는 그림 그리는 것을 좋아한다.
She likes .
> **정답** drawing (painting)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
요리하는 것은 재미있다.
Cooking is fun
> **정답** Cooking / is / fun

---

**17.** 자고 있는 아기를 깨우지 마.
Don't wake up the sleeping baby
> **정답** Don't / wake / up / the / sleeping / baby

---

**18.** 나의 꿈은 여행하기이다.
My dream traveling is
> **정답** My / dream / is / traveling

---

**19.** 춤추고 있는 아이들을 봐라.
Look at dancing the children
> **정답** Look / at / the / dancing / children

---

**20.** 그는 독서를 즐긴다.
He reading enjoys books
> **정답** He / enjoys / reading / books
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 076: 동명사와 현재분사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 <보기>와 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인
문장을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy is in the waiting room.
Amy loves drawing pictures of her own.
Will you really buy the talking robot?
I am looking at a sleeping baby.
It is hard to catch swimming fish.
> **정답** Amy loves drawing pictures of her own.

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 <보기>와 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인
문장을 고르시오.
<보기> I found the crying kid on the street.
We all enjoy reading non-fictions.
Tom's hobby is baking cookies.
Smiling at people also makes me happy.
Be careful of boiling water.
> **정답** Be careful of boiling water.

---

**03.** 다음 중 동명사가 쓰이지 않은 문장을 고르시오.
Amy told me about the shocking news.
Tom loves eating ice cream.
I am wearing a pair of running shoes.
The climber packed a sleeping bag.
> **정답** Amy told me about the shocking news.

---

**04.** 다음 중 동명사가 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.
The children like interesting things.
She is taking the boring yoga class.
There are a lot of singing birds on the tree.
My dad is looking for the parking lot.
> **정답** My dad is looking for the parking lot.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I finally closed the boring book.
Tom spent time with the smiling baby.
Annoying things make me worried.
Some adults need sleeping pills at night.
> **정답** Some adults need sleeping pills at night.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Please take out any reading material.
The place may have some drinking water.
Please put away the melting ice cream.
She was in the waiting room of the restaurant.
> **정답** Please put away the melting ice cream.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Tom needed a new pair of boxing gloves.
Some elderly women walk with a walking
stick.
Do you have another writing pen?
The clerk doesn't like complaining customers.
> **정답** The clerk doesn't like complaining customers.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The man tried to fix the washing machine.
When we were watching movie, a talk parrot
flew in.
I saw singing birds in the woods.
The girl didn't want to take boring classes.
> **정답** When we were watching movie, a talk parrot flew in.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I will buy a new washing machine this week.
The teacher gave out some difficult reading
materials.
Amy was studying in a live room.
His running shoes were too dirty.
> **정답** Amy was studying in a live room.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 카페에서 말하는 로봇이 커피를 나르는 것을 보았다.
I saw a talking robot serving coffee in a cafe.
I saw a talk robot serving coffee in a cafe.
I saw a talking robot to serve coffee in a cafe.
I saw a talking robot to serving coffee in a
cafe.
> **정답** I saw a talking robot serving coffee in a cafe.

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
지루한 시합 후에 Tom은 러닝화를 세탁기에 넣었다.
After a boring match, Tom put the running
shoes into the washing machine.
After a bored match, Tom put the run shoes
into the washing machine.
After a boring match, Tom put the running
shoes into the wash machine.
After a bored match, Tom put the running
shoes into the wash machine.
> **정답** After a boring match, Tom put the running shoes
into the washing machine.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
주차장에 우는 아이가 있었다.
There was a crying baby in a parking lot.
There was a cry baby in a parking lot.
There was a crying baby in a park lot.
There was a cry baby in a park lot.
> **정답** There was a crying baby in a parking lot.

---

**13.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을
고르시오.
To go to a pool, we need swimming suits.
I am looking for my training pants.
Look at that flying birds!
Tom likes collecting old stamps.
> **정답** Look at that flying birds!

---

**14.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을
고르시오.
The wind blew the falling leaves in winter.
You should check the running water tap.
Do not touch these barking dogs.
Are you washing the new frying pan?
> **정답** Are you washing the new frying pan?

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Her job is make shoes.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** make → making (to make)

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom is wash his running
shoes.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wash → washing

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I saw cried kid in front of
the store.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cried → crying

---

**18.** 다음 중 동명사로 쓰인 -ing형태를 고르시오.
I went to the mall with mom. Mom went inside to
pick up a few things. And I was (A)waiting in the
car in the (B)parking lot. Suddenly, I saw a
(C)crying kid. I looked around. Over there, a
woman was (D)running to him.
(C)
(B)
(D)
(A)
> **정답** (B)

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I want __________ a __________ robot for my
grandmother.
buying - talking
to buy - talk
buying - talk
to buy - talking
> **정답** to buy - talking

---

**20.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
We packed ________________ bags and some food
for the trip.
The ___________ girl is my sister.
sleeping - smile
sleeping - smiling
sleep - smiled
sleep - smiling
> **정답** sleeping - smiling
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 076 동명사와 현재분사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
Dave는 그의 친구로부터 낚시대를 빌렸다. [fish rod]
Dave borrowed a  (     )   (     )  from his friend.
정답 fishing, rod

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
Julie는 마실 물을 찾고 있었다. [drink water]
Julie was looking for  (     )   (     ) .
정답 drinking, water

---

**03.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
The lake is full of swim ducks.
→ The lake  (     ) .
정답 is full of swimming ducks

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Both Hilary and Amanda are work moms.
→ Both Hilary and Amanda 
정답 are working moms

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (2개)
The climber is wear a pair of hike boots.
→ The climber  (     ) .
정답 is wearing a pair of hiking boots

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 문맥에 맞게 고쳐 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
cry kid
A: What this noise?
B: I think there is a  (     )   (     )  outside.
정답 crying, kid

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
put, wash, machine
A: My clothes are all dirty. Where can I put them
mom?
B: Please,  (     )  them into the  (     ) .
정답 put, washing machine

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
bathe, suit
A: What do we need when going to the pool?
B: We need a  (     )   (     )  for sure.
정답 bathing, suit

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오.
그녀는 야구경기를 보고 있는 중이다.
(watch, a baseball game)
정답 She is watching a baseball game.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오.
나는 피아노 치는 것을 즐긴다.
(enjoy, play the piano)
정답 I enjoy playing the piano.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 076: 동명사와 현재분사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 <보기>와 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom is in the waiting room.
Amy loves drawing pictures of her own.
Will you really buy the talking robot?
I am looking at a sleeping cat.
It is hard to catch swimming fish.
> 정답: Amy loves drawing pictures of her own.

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 <보기>와 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.
<보기> I found the crying puppy on the street.
We all enjoy reading comics.
Tom's hobby is baking muffins.
Smiling at people also makes me happy.
Be careful of boiling water.
> 정답: Be careful of boiling water.

---

**03.** 다음 중 동명사가 쓰이지 않은 문장을 고르시오.
Amy told me about the surprising news.
Tom loves eating watermelon.
I am wearing a pair of running shoes.
The hiker packed a sleeping bag.
> 정답: Amy told me about the surprising news.

---

**04.** 다음 중 동명사가 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.
The children like exciting things.
She is taking the boring art class.
There are a lot of singing birds on the branch.
My mom is looking for the parking lot.
> 정답: My mom is looking for the parking lot.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I finally closed the boring book.
Tom spent time with the smiling puppy.
Annoying sounds make me worried.
Some people need sleeping pills at night.
> 정답: Some people need sleeping pills at night.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Please take out any reading material.
The camp may have some drinking water.
Please put away the melting chocolate.
She was in the waiting room of the clinic.
> 정답: Please put away the melting chocolate.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Tom needed a new pair of boxing gloves.
Some elderly people walk with a walking stick.
Do you have another writing pen?
The teacher doesn't like complaining students.
> 정답: The teacher doesn't like complaining students.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The boy tried to fix the washing machine.
When we were watching a movie, a talk parrot flew in.
I saw singing birds in the garden.
The girl didn't want to take boring lessons.
> 정답: When we were watching a movie, a talk parrot flew in.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I will buy a new washing machine this month.
The teacher gave out some difficult reading materials.
Tom was studying in a live room.
His running shoes were too dirty.
> 정답: Tom was studying in a live room.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 카페에서 말하는 로봇이 음료를 나르는 것을 보았다.
I saw a talking robot serving drinks in a cafe.
I saw a talk robot serving drinks in a cafe.
I saw a talking robot to serve drinks in a cafe.
I saw a talking robot to serving drinks in a cafe.
> 정답: I saw a talking robot serving drinks in a cafe.

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
지루한 연습 후에 Tom은 러닝화를 세탁기에 넣었다.
After a boring practice, Tom put the running shoes into the washing machine.
After a bored practice, Tom put the run shoes into the washing machine.
After a boring practice, Tom put the running shoes into the wash machine.
After a bored practice, Tom put the running shoes into the wash machine.
> 정답: After a boring practice, Tom put the running shoes

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
주차장에 우는 아이가 있었다.
There was a crying child in a parking lot.
There was a cry child in a parking lot.
There was a crying child in a park lot.
There was a cry child in a park lot.
> 정답: There was a crying child in a parking lot.

---

**13.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
To go to a pool, we need swimming suits.
I am looking for my training pants.
Look at that flying birds!
Tom likes collecting old coins.
> 정답: Look at that flying birds!

---

**14.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
The wind blew the falling leaves in autumn.
You should check the running water tap.
Do not touch these barking dogs.
Are you washing the new frying pan?
> 정답: Are you washing the new frying pan?

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Her  job  is  make  bags. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: make → making (to make)

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  is  wash  his  running shoes. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: wash → washing

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. I  saw  cried  puppy  in  front  of the  shop. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: cried → crying

---

**18.** 다음 중 동명사로 쓰인 -ing형태를 고르시오.
I went to the mall with dad.
Dad went inside to pick up a few items.
And I was (A)waiting in the car in the (B)parking lot.
Suddenly, I saw a (C)crying puppy.
I looked around.
Over there, a boy was (D)running to it. (C) (B) (D) (A)
> 정답: (B)

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
